holdings.infoBox: CQTM is an equity ETF with a total of 20 individual holdings. The top holdings are IonQ, Inc. stock at 22.32%, D-Wave Quantum at 22.12%, Horizon Quantum Holdings at 6.11%, Quantum eMotion at 4.89%, and BTQ Technologies at 4.86%.

overview.description: The Corgi Quantum Computing ETF (CQTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund invests in quantum computing and quantum-enabled technology companies. The actively managed ETF targets companies involved from around the world building the quantum future, protecting, and defending against it. CQTM was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
